_schema_notes: Values here are inherited by every GA jurisdiction config via deep-merge in load_config().
Per-jurisdiction values OVERRIDE these defaults when present.
Law-specific citations live in jurisdictions/_open_records_laws.json (loaded by audit.py).
This file holds non-law state defaults: body taxonomy, election conventions, scraper hints, form-of-government norms.

common_body_aliases._doc: Maps clerk-vocabulary variations to canonical body_type enum values. Used by onboard_jurisdiction.py and during scraper classification.

form_of_government_conventions._doc: Default form-of-government for new GA configs when otherwise unknown. Cities/towns most commonly use mayor_council variants; counties use county_commission.

election_cycle_defaults._doc: Typical election cadences for GA local offices. Per-jurisdiction configs override when charters differ.

platform_conventions._doc: What platforms GA jurisdictions tend to use — speeds onboarding.

records_custodian_conventions._doc: Default custodian title by jurisdiction type. Names are always per-jurisdiction.
